lyra.name: Lyra
lyra.journal: Met Lyra, the baker. Her hands are always dusted with flour.

cass.name: Cass
cass.journal: Met Cass, the reckless hunter. Younger than Tomas.

tomas.name: Tomas
tomas.journal: Met Tomas, the cautious hunter. Cass's older brother.

wem.name: Wem
wem.journal: Met Wem, the old fisherman by the shore.

halden.name: Halden
halden.journal: Met Halden, the keeper of the shrine. She seemed to know me.
